scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:whatsapp"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/server && cd home-repair-vite && npm run build
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/server && cd home-repair-vite && npx tsc --noEmit
